title: Status Asthmaticus in the Pediatric ICU: A Comprehensive Review of Management and Challenges
model_role: Pediatric status asthmaticus overview; PICU therapies; context for ketamine, magnesium, NIV/IMV and escalation.
notes: Narrative review; useful background, not a source for numerical calibration.

title: Clinical review: Mechanical ventilation in severe asthma
model_role: Core mechanical-ventilation physiology: gas trapping, dynamic hyperinflation, auto-PEEP, Pplat target, permissive hypercapnia, low RR/VT strategy.
notes: Adult/mixed severe-asthma physiology; applied as directional anchor, not pediatric calibration.

title: Mechanical ventilation for severe asthma
model_role: Modern review supporting ventilator strategy that prioritizes avoidance of complications over rapid hypercapnia correction.
notes: Primarily adult severe-asthma review; used for discussion and physiology framing.

title: The effects of ventilatory pattern on hyperinflation, airway pressures, and circulation in mechanical ventilation of patients with severe air-flow obstruction
model_role: Physiologic anchor for respiratory pattern effects on hyperinflation, airway pressures and circulation.
notes: Adult severe airflow obstruction; foundational for directional model behavior.

authors: Leatherman JW; McArthur C; Shapiro RS
title: Effect of prolongation of expiratory time on dynamic hyperinflation in mechanically ventilated patients with severe asthma
model_role: Supports scenario behavior: increasing expiratory time reduces dynamic hyperinflation/plateau pressure.
notes: Adult mechanically ventilated severe asthma; strong support for Te/tau educational mechanism.

authors: Ranieri VM; Grasso S; Fiore T; Giuliani R
title: Auto-positive end-expiratory pressure and dynamic hyperinflation
model_role: Conceptual support for auto-PEEP and dynamic hyperinflation measurement/interpretation.

authors: Sarnaik AP; Daphtary KM; Meert KL; Lieh-Lai MW; Heidemann SM
title: Pressure-controlled ventilation in children with severe status asthmaticus
model_role: Pediatric invasive-ventilation anchor; supports inclusion of pressure-control/pressure-limited scenarios.
notes: Retrospective pediatric series; supports plausibility, not equation calibration.

title: Pressure-support ventilation in children with severe asthma
model_role: Pediatric pressure-support anchor; supports spontaneous/pressure-support educational scenario.

authors: Cox RG; Barker GA; Bohn DJ
title: Efficacy, results, and complications of mechanical ventilation in children with status asthmaticus
notes: Older pediatric cohort; useful for background and risk context.

authors: Smith A; Franca UL; McManus ML
title: Trends in the Use of Noninvasive and Invasive Ventilation for Severe Asthma
model_role: PHIS 2014-2018 epidemiology: NIV increased; IMV rare/stable; age 2-17 target context.
notes: Database study; not a physiology source.

authors: Smith MA; Dinh D; Ly NP; Ward SL; McGarry ME; Zinter MS
title: Changes in the Use of Invasive and Noninvasive Mechanical Ventilation in Pediatric Asthma: 2009-2019
journal: Annals of the American Thoracic Society
model_role: VPS 2009-2019 epidemiology; intubation decreased while NIV increased; supports current relevance.

title: Severe Acute Asthma Exacerbation in Children: A Stepwise Approach for Escalating Therapy in a Pediatric Intensive Care Unit
journal: Journal of Pediatric Pharmacology and Therapeutics
model_role: Pediatric escalation therapies; magnesium/ketamine/steroid dose context; stepwise PICU approach.
notes: Review/pathway style; useful but not definitive efficacy evidence.

title: Ketamine in status asthmaticus: A review
journal: Indian Journal of Critical Care Medicine
model_role: Ketamine as plausible bronchodilator/sedative adjunct; heterogeneous evidence base.
notes: Narrative review with mixed adult/pediatric reports; do not overclaim efficacy.

title: Ketamine for management of acute exacerbations of asthma in children
model_role: High-level cautionary anchor: limited pediatric trial evidence; ketamine effect should remain optional and conservative.
notes: Supports uncertainty framing more than positive effect size.

authors: Youssef-Ahmed MZ; Silver P; Nimkoff L; Sagy M
title: Continuous infusion of ketamine in mechanically ventilated children with refractory bronchospasm
model_role: Pediatric ventilated bronchospasm series; supports a gradual ketamine-response educational scenario.
notes: Retrospective, mixed etiologies; use as plausibility signal, not proof.

authors: Johnson PN; Drury AS; Gupta N
title: Continuous Magnesium Sulfate Infusions for Status Asthmaticus in Children: A Systematic Review
model_role: Magnesium infusion dosing ranges and safety/efficacy uncertainty in refractory pediatric status asthmaticus.
notes: Supports conservative delayed magnesium effect and uncertainty statement.

title: Intravenous magnesium sulfate for treating children with acute asthma in the emergency department
model_role: Evidence anchor for IV magnesium in moderate-to-severe pediatric acute asthma; limited but supportive ED evidence.
notes: ED setting, not necessarily intubated PICU; apply carefully.

title: Asthma Management in the PICU: Asthma Clinical Practice Guideline Reference Guide
model_role: Practical PICU red flags: hypercapnia, HFNC/NIV need, persistent hypoxemia, altered mental status.
notes: Institutional pathway; not a peer-reviewed article. Keep separate from primary literature if journal dislikes pathway citations.

title: Managing an acute asthma exacerbation in children
model_role: Clinical context for intubation complications and pediatric acute asthma management.
notes: Guidance document; useful for background and risk wording.
